recommendations.title: The Englishman Who Went Up a Hill But Came Down a Mountain
recommendations.overview: When an English cartographer arrives in Wales to tell the residents of the Welsh village of Ffynnon Garw  that their 'mountain' is only a hill, the offended community sets out to remedy the situation.

recommendations.title: Satan's Little Helper
recommendations.overview: A naïve young boy unknowingly becomes the pawn of a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: 1000 Miles From Christmas
recommendations.overview: An auditor who completely despises Christmas is sent to a small town for work, where he meets a woman determined to change his view about the holiday.

recommendations.title: Bandslam
recommendations.overview: A  new kid in town assembles a fledgling rock band — together, they achieve their dreams and compete against the best in the biggest event of the year, a battle of the bands.

recommendations.title: Tini: The New Life of Violetta
recommendations.overview: A teen star ventures out to the Italian countryside for a summer and emerges a new artist.

recommendations.title: Rock of Ages
recommendations.overview: A small town girl and a city boy meet on the Sunset Strip, while pursuing their Hollywood dreams.

recommendations.title: Ana e Vitória
recommendations.overview: Two girls have a chance encounter and instantly befriend. While trying to find themselves, they decide to pursue music together.

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: Class
recommendations.overview: Naive Midwestern prep student Jonathan bonds with his more worldly roommate, Skip, who takes the small-town boy under his wing. At Skip's urging, the inexperienced Jonathan is emboldened to seek out older women in the cocktail lounges of nearby Chica
